next_action: Positive candidates exist, but current margins are thin or have robustness caveats. Next work: assemble the full available contract set, repeat snapshots, and require forward-context or independent validation before treating any row as stronger than watch-only research.

policy.robust_rule: candidate rule plus margin_probability >= min_robust_margin, verified official terms, clean timing, and pass gate

rows.resolution_rule:
rules_primary: If Miami wins the Miami vs Las Vegas professional football game originally scheduled for Sep 13, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team who wins the Miami vs Las Vegas professional football game originally scheduled for Sep 13, 2026. If the game ends in a tie, the market will resolve to $0.50 for each team. If the game is postponed but begins within 48 hours from its originally scheduled start time, the market will remain open and resolve based on the official final result. If the game is not started within 48 hours, the market will resolve to a fair market price.
robustness_reasons: fee is estimated from executable price
